distilleries.name: Distilleria Nannoni
distilleries.description: Founded 1973 in the Maremma by Gioacchino Nannoni, now run by Priscilla Occhipinti. The most awarded Italian grappa producer with 150+ international medals; specialises in cru grappa from single Tuscan varietals.
distilleries.distillation_method: Bain-marie copper alembic stills; pomace distilled within 24 hours of arrival
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visits and grappa flights by appointment; gin and brandy masterclasses also available

distilleries.name: Distilleria Deta
distilleries.address: Strada di Poneta 2/16, 50028 Barberino Tavarnelle, Italy
distilleries.classification: Grappa di Toscana, Acquavite di Vino
spirits_produced: Grappa di Vernaccia di San Gimignano
distilleries.description: Founded 1926 by the Torrigiani di Santa Cristina family in Chianti Classico. Tuscan grappa specialist combining traditional techniques with modern eco-distilling; multiple London Spirits silver medals.
distilleries.distillation_method: Continuous and discontinuous alembic stills processing fresh wine-grape pomace from Tuscan estates
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visits and tastings by appointment; full Tuscan grappa flight from EUR 15

distilleries.name: Distillerie Bonollo Torrita di Siena
distilleries.address: Strada Provinciale 326 di Sinalunga, 53049 Torrita di Siena, Italy
distilleries.classification: Grappa di Toscana, Acquavite di Vino
distilleries.description: Bonollo's Tuscan flagship plant in Torrita di Siena, on the historic site of an ancient distillery rebuilt in 1976. Continuous and discontinuous alembics; pomace sourced from Brunello, Nobile and Chianti Classico estates.
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visits and tastings by appointment for groups; educational tours available

distilleries.name: Liquorificio Morelli
distilleries.address: Via Meucci 2, Localita Montanelli, 56036 Palaia, Italy
distilleries.description: Founded 1911 by Leonello Morelli in the Valdera, this family-run liquorificio is among Tuscany's oldest, producing grappa from continuous distillation of certified Tuscan pomace plus traditional liqueurs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Continuous distillation of fresh Tuscan pomace; barrel ageing in large casks
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery and shop visits by appointment; structured tasting flights of grappa and liqueurs

distilleries.name: Distilleria Toscana Colle Val d'Elsa
distilleries.address: Via Cervaione 33, 53034 Colle di Val d'Elsa, Italy
distilleries.description: Colle Val d'Elsa distillery founded from a family tradition of distillation spanning over 50 years. Produces single-variety Tuscan grappa plus a botanical gin with juniper from the Maremma macchia.
distilleries.distillation_method: Bain-marie discontinuous copper alembic stills; small-batch artisan production
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery tours and tastings by appointment; gin distillation masterclasses on request
